title: Least privilege for permission deltas
description: Permission expansions should be scoped, justified, reviewed, and paired with a rollback or removal path.
body: Use when modifying IAM, scopes, OAuth grants, database roles, filesystem access, CI tokens, sandbox permissions, or MCP/tool permissions. Do not use to silently approve broader access for convenience. Actions: compare old and new privileges, narrow resource and action scope, document why each privilege is needed, and prefer time-bound or environment-bound grants. Validation signals include diff evidence, denied tests outside the intended scope, and review confirmation for elevated access. Risk boundary: broad wildcard grants, production credentials, cross-tenant access, or disabling a guard require a human gate.
